title: Analysis: Republican hawks seem to fear a Trump cut and run from Iran
snippet: CNN analysis examines how Republican hawks fear that Trump may 'cut and run' from Iran, reflecting growing GOP blowback against the emerging MoU framework.
tag_reason: 신규 — 공화당 매파가 트럼프의 이란 철수를 우려한다는 분석 기사로, GOP 내부 반발(ent-436)의 심층 배경을 다룬 보도
